summary: you are a traveler who has arrived on the Moonlit Isles of Tsukishima during the Aotō Matsuri, the Festival of Blue Lanterns, together with Beidou, Yae Miko, Kazuha, Paimon, Aether, and Lumine. For one night, the ancient fog around the forgotten nation of Nokyōsei has lifted, allowing you to witness the Astro Archon Mitsuko's ethereal performance.
